title: Dimension Expansion
description: Designed for 1.21.1, add new dimensions to your modpack with teleporter blocks and fun new features. Deep Beneath, Mining Dim and Stoneblock. More to come!
body:
## Dimension Expansion

A **Dimension Mod for Minecraft 1.21.1**, inspired by _[Extra Utilities 2 – Deep Dark](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extra-utilities)_ and _[The Beneath / Deep Dank](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-beneath)_ Discover **The Deep Beneath**, a vast underground realm of eternal night, thick darkness, and relentless danger.

The **Mining Dimension** inspired by _[Aroma1997s Dimensional World](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aroma1997s-dimensional-world)_ as well as other more modern takes on Mining Dimensions. Our mining dimension is flat with no features except ores underground.

And a **Stoneblock** dimension, which is only working conceptually. It's obviously inspired by the same named modpacks but really the goal here is to add a dimension that could be utilized in modpacks for different purposes or maybe in lieu of the mining dimension.

***

### The Mining Dimension

A peaceful alternative for resource gathering.

*   A superflat world with a large layer of Stone, then Deepslate, then Netherrack and then End Stone with ores in each layer. but **with no caves or caverns**.
*   **Completely free of hostile mobs.**
*   Higher Y-level (Y=208) terrain for large-scale mining or automation builds.

***

### The Stone Block Dimension (not fully implemented)

A true builder’s dream — or miner’s challenge.

*   **Solid from bedrock to bedrock** (-64 to 320).
*   Filled entirely with **stone and deepslate**, packed with ores.

***

### Fully Data-Driven and Customizable

All dimensions are **configurable via datapacks**, letting you tweak:

*   **Ores and biome features**
*   **Mob behavior and spawn rates**
*   **Noise settings, blocks, and light rules**

For modpack developers, this means you can completely reshape these worlds without touching code.

See the **[GitHub Wiki](https://github.com/darklotus781/Dimension-Expansion/wiki)** for detailed guides on datapack customization, noise settings, and mod integration.

***

### Actively Developed

These dimensions are only the beginning — expect more biomes, structures, and challenges in future updates. Have ideas or feedback? We’d love to hear from you.

**Need Help or Want to Share Your Builds?** Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/XH7zCjgUHb) — the community is always growing, and we can’t wait to see what you create!
